name: add_tracks_to_playlist
description: Add one or more tracks to a playlist by their Spotify URIs. You can specify the position to insert the tracks.

parameters.name: playlist_id
parameters.description: The Spotify ID of the playlist to add tracks to.

parameters.name: uris
parameters.description: Array of Spotify track URIs to add. Each URI follows the format 'spotify:track:{id}'.

parameters.name: position
parameters.description: Zero-based position to insert the tracks. Omit to append to the end.
